# invisible-string

> An open-source, self-hostable platform for automating your work: describe a workflow in plain language — what starts it, what tools it can use, how it should think — and publish it to run from chat, Slack, forms, webhooks, or a schedule. Runs stream live, pause for human approval, and survive infrastructure failure without losing work.

## Docs

- [Overview](/docs/getting-started/overview): what invisible-string is and how the pieces fit
- [Quickstart](/docs/getting-started/quickstart): run the whole stack locally
- [The four pillars](/docs/concepts/four-pillars): trigger, context, agent, instructions
- [Triggers](/docs/building/triggers): chat, webhook, form, Slack, and schedule ingress
- [Architecture](/docs/platform/architecture): control plane, stateless workers, compiler
- [Durability](/docs/platform/durability): runs survive worker death and resume anywhere

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/heysanil/invisible-string): repository and issue tracker
